title: roldana kerberi var. calzadana
intro: Roldana kerberi var. calzadana is a variety of the Roldana kerberi plant, also known as Mexican silver mist, which belongs to the daisy family and is native to Mexico. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and saponins. The health benefits of Roldana kerberi var. calzadana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and protect against certain infections, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Roldana kerberi var. calzadana plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
